structure._description: Référentiel du rôle astrologique interprétatif d’un objet dans le thème.
structure.label: string

data.label: Luminary
data.description: Astrological role assigned to the Sun and Moon, associated with core vitality, consciousness, instinct, and emotional life.

data.label: Personal planet
data.description: Fast-moving planet associated with individual personality, perception, desire, communication, attraction, and action.

data.label: Social planet
data.description: Planet associated with social integration, growth, responsibility, structure, belief systems, and maturation.

data.label: Transpersonal planet
data.description: Slow-moving planet associated with collective, generational, transformative, disruptive, or spiritual dynamics.

data.label: Angle
data.description: Major chart angle associated with incarnation, relationship, public direction, and private foundation.

data.label: Lunar node
data.description: Calculated lunar point associated with developmental direction, inherited patterns, karmic symbolism, and life trajectory.
